instruction: Building a tree step by step (step 1 of 6). The canvas is empty. Add the next part: line ((8,112)→(120,112), stroke #222, stroke-width 2) with id "ground".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="112" x2="120" y2="112" />
</svg>
